notes: Direction A: scored on data/built/test (the held-out test split).
Direction B: gheim run on external benchmarks; per-dataset converters remap labels into our 8-cat schema before scoring.
strict_span uses seqeval-token-level for HF/ONNX backends and char-set-strict for spaCy/Presidio (which lack a token grid).
char F1 is char-label-aware and is comparable across all backends.
